leadText: The Medal Box (Japanese: メダルボックス Medal Box) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Medal Box allows the player to collect Medals , and check which ones they have obtained by using it in the Bag .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A box-shaped machine that stores Medals and Medal information.
